metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Alert Event ASIM filtering parser for Google SecOps Detection Alerts
properties.query:
let AlertVerdictLookup = datatable(threat_verdict: string, AlertVerdict: string)
  [
  "MALICIOUS",  "True Positive",
  "SUSPICIOUS", "True Positive",
  "BENIGN",     "Benign Positive",
  "UNKNOWN",    "Unknown"
];
let SeverityLookup = datatable(orig_severity: string, EventSeverity: string)
  [
  "CRITICAL",      "High",
  "HIGH",          "High",
  "MEDIUM",        "Medium",
  "LOW",           "Low",
  "INFORMATIONAL", "Informational",
  "INFO",          "Informational"
];
let EventSubTypeLookup = datatable(detection_type: string, EventSubType: string)
  [
  "RULE_DETECTION", "Threat",
  "GCTI_FINDING",   "Threat",
  "JOB_DETECTION",  "Suspicious Activity"
];
let DetectionMethodLookup = datatable(detection_type: string, DetectionMethod: string)
  [
  "RULE_DETECTION", "Behavioral Analytics",
  "GCTI_FINDING",   "Threat Intelligence",
  "JOB_DETECTION",  "Automated Investigation"
];
let IndicatorTypeLookup = datatable(entity_type_raw: string, IndicatorType: string)
  [
  "IP_ADDRESS",  "Ip",
  "DOMAIN_NAME", "Url",
  "USER",        "User",
  "ASSET",       "Host",
  "FILE",        "File",
  "URL",         "Url",
  "PROCESS",     "Process"
];
let parser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null),
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    hostname_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    username_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    attacktactics_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    attacktechniques_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    threatcategory_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    alertverdict_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventseverity_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false
  ) {
  DetectionAlerts_CL
  | where not(disabled)
  | where (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
      and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
  //  Expand detection array (one row per detection element) 
  | extend detection_array = detection
  | where isnotnull(detection_array) and array_length(detection_array) > 0
  | mv-expand detection = detection_array
  //  Top-level columns 
  | extend
      detection_id       = id,
      detection_type     = DetectionType,
      tw_start           = todatetime(timeWindow_startTime),
      tw_end             = todatetime(timeWindow_endTime),
      collection_arr     = collectionElements,
      detect_timing      = detectionTimingDetails,
      latency_metrics    = latencyMetrics
  //  Fields from expanded detection element 
  | extend
      rule_name          = tostring(detection.ruleName),
      rule_id            = tostring(detection.ruleId),
      rule_version       = tostring(detection.ruleVersion),
      rule_type          = tostring(detection.ruleType),
      rule_labels        = detection.ruleLabels,
      detect_desc        = tostring(detection.description),
      orig_severity      = tostring(detection.severity),
      alert_state        = tostring(detection.alertState),
      risk_score_raw     = tostring(detection.riskScore),
      url_back           = tostring(detection.urlBackToProduct),
      detect_fields      = detection.detectionFields,
      outcomes           = detection.outcomes,
      variables          = detection.variables
  //  Entity variables (principal / source / target) 
  | extend
      DvcIpAddr   = tostring(coalesce(
                      variables.principal_ip.value,
                      variables.source_ip.value,
                      variables.correlation_ip.value)),
      Username    = tostring(coalesce(
                      variables.principal_user_userid.value,
                      variables.source_user_userid.value,
                      variables.user.value))
  // Hostname helper function
  | extend Hostname = tostring(coalesce(
              variables.principal_hostname.value,
              variables.principal_asset_hostname.value,
              variables.source_hostname.value))
  | invoke _ASIM_ResolveDvcFQDN("Hostname")
  //  IP / hostname / username filters 
  | where (array_length(ipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0) or has_any_ipv4_prefix(DvcIpAddr, ipaddr_has_any_prefix)
  | where (array_length(hostname_has_any) == 0) or (DvcHostname has_any (hostname_has_any))
  | where (array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or (Username has_any (username_has_any))
  //  Severity normalisation 
  | lookup SeverityLookup on orig_severity
  | extend EventSeverity = coalesce(EventSeverity, "Informational")
  | where (array_length(eventseverity_has_any) == 0) or (EventSeverity has_any (eventseverity_has_any))
  //  EventSubType / DetectionMethod 
  | lookup EventSubTypeLookup on detection_type
  | extend EventSubType = coalesce(EventSubType, "Threat")
  | lookup DetectionMethodLookup on detection_type
  | extend DetectionMethod = coalesce(DetectionMethod, "Behavioral Analytics")
  //  AlertStatus 
  | extend
      AlertStatus         = case(alert_state == "ALERTING", "Active", "Closed"),
      AlertOriginalStatus = alert_state
  //  ThreatRiskLevel 
  | extend
      ThreatRiskLevel         = toint(risk_score_raw),
      ThreatOriginalRiskLevel = risk_score_raw
  //  Threat intelligence from collectionElements 
  | extend
      threat_obj          = coalesce(todynamic(collection_arr)[0].references[0].entity.metadata.threat[0], todynamic(collection_arr)[1].references[0].entity.metadata.threat[0]),
      entity_type_raw     = coalesce(tostring(todynamic(collection_arr)[0].references[0].entity.metadata.entityType), tostring(todynamic(collection_arr)[1].references[0].entity.metadata.entityType))
  | extend
      threat_verdict_raw  = tostring(threat_obj.threatVerdict),
      threat_category_raw = tostring(threat_obj.category),
      threat_name_raw     = tostring(threat_obj.summary),
      threat_first_ts     = todatetime(threat_obj.firstDiscoveredTime),
      threat_last_ts      = todatetime(threat_obj.lastUpdatedTime),
      threat_url          = tostring(threat_obj.urlBackToProduct)
  //  AlertVerdict 
  | extend threat_verdict = threat_verdict_raw
  | lookup AlertVerdictLookup on threat_verdict
  | extend AlertVerdict = coalesce(AlertVerdict, "Unknown")
  | where (array_length(alertverdict_has_any) == 0) or (AlertVerdict has_any (alertverdict_has_any))
  //  ThreatCategory 
  | extend
      ThreatOriginalCategory = threat_category_raw,
      ThreatCategory = case(
          threat_category_raw has "MALWARE",       "Malware",
          threat_category_raw has "RANSOMWARE",    "Ransomware",
          threat_category_raw has "TROJAN",        "Trojan",
          threat_category_raw has "VIRUS",         "Virus",
          threat_category_raw has "WORM",          "Worm",
          threat_category_raw has "ADWARE",        "Adware",
          threat_category_raw has "SPYWARE",       "Spyware",
          threat_category_raw has "ROOTKIT",       "Rootkit",
          threat_category_raw has "CRYPTOMINER",   "Cryptominer",
          threat_category_raw has "PHISHING",      "Phishing",
          threat_category_raw has "SPAM",          "Spam",
          threat_category_raw has "NETWORK_RECON", "Security Policy Violation",
          isnotempty(threat_category_raw),         "Unknown",
                                                   "Unknown")
  | where (array_length(threatcategory_has_any) == 0) or (ThreatCategory has_any (threatcategory_has_any))
  //  IndicatorType
  | lookup IndicatorTypeLookup on entity_type_raw
  | extend IndicatorType = coalesce(IndicatorType, "Ip")
  //  User fields 
  | extend UsernameType = _ASIM_GetUsernameType(Username)
  //  AttackTactics / AttackTechniques
  | mv-apply rl = rule_labels on (
      summarize
          AttackTactics = anyif(tostring(rl.value), rl.key == "mitre_attack_tactic"),
          AttackTechniques = anyif(tostring(rl.value), rl.key == "mitre_attack_technique")
  )
  | where (array_length(attacktactics_has_any) == 0) or (AttackTactics has_any (attacktactics_has_any))
  | where (array_length(attacktechniques_has_any) == 0) or (AttackTechniques has_any (attacktechniques_has_any))
  //  Mandatory / Recommended event fields
  | extend
      EventType             = "Alert",
      EventCount            = int(1),
      EventUid              = detection_id,
      EventOriginalUid      = detection_id,
      EventProduct          = "GoogleSecOps",
      EventVendor           = "Google",
      EventSchema           = "AlertEvent",
      EventSchemaVersion    = "0.1",
      EventMessage          = detect_desc,
      EventOriginalSeverity = orig_severity,
      EventOriginalSubType  = detection_type,
      AlertName             = rule_name,
      RuleName              = rule_name,
      RuleDescription       = detect_desc
  //  Rename
  | project-rename
      EventStartTime          = tw_start,
      EventEndTime            = tw_end,
      EventReportUrl          = url_back,
      ThreatName              = threat_name_raw,
      ThreatFirstReportedTime = threat_first_ts,
      ThreatLastReportedTime  = threat_last_ts,
      Url                     = threat_url
  //  AdditionalFields bag
  | extend AdditionalFields = iff (
      pack,
      bag_pack(
        "ruleId",                 rule_id,
        "ruleVersion",            rule_version,
        "ruleType",               rule_type,
        "ruleLabels",             rule_labels,
        "detectionFields",        detect_fields,
        "outcomes",               outcomes,
        "variables",              variables,
        "detectionTimingDetails", detect_timing,
        "latencyMetrics",         latency_metrics),
      dynamic([])
    )
  //  Aliases
  | extend
      AlertId          = EventUid,
      AlertDescription = EventMessage,
      IpAddr           = DvcIpAddr,
      Hostname         = DvcHostname,
      User             = Username,
      Rule             = RuleName
  //  Project only final ASIM fields
  | project
      TimeGenerated,
      Type,
      EventType,
      EventCount,
      EventStartTime,
      EventEndTime,
      EventUid,
      EventOriginalUid,
      EventProduct,
      EventVendor,
      EventSchema,
      EventSchemaVersion,
      EventMessage,
      EventOriginalSeverity,
      EventSeverity,
      EventSubType,
      EventOriginalSubType,
      EventReportUrl,
      DetectionMethod,
      AlertStatus,
      AlertOriginalStatus,
      AlertVerdict,
      AlertName,
      AlertId,
      AlertDescription,
      RuleName,
      RuleDescription,
      ThreatRiskLevel,
      ThreatOriginalRiskLevel,
      ThreatOriginalCategory,
      ThreatCategory,
      ThreatName,
      ThreatFirstReportedTime,
      ThreatLastReportedTime,
      IndicatorType,
      AttackTactics,
      AttackTechniques,
      DvcIpAddr,
      DvcHostname,
      DvcDomain,
      DvcFQDN,
      DvcDomainType,
      Username,
      UsernameType,
      AdditionalFields,
      Url,
      IpAddr,
      Hostname,
      User,
      Rule
};
parser(
    starttime             = starttime,
    endtime               = endtime,
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix = ipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    hostname_has_any      = hostname_has_any,
    username_has_any      = username_has_any,
    attacktactics_has_any    = attacktactics_has_any,
    attacktechniques_has_any = attacktechniques_has_any,
    threatcategory_has_any   = threatcategory_has_any,
    alertverdict_has_any     = alertverdict_has_any,
    eventseverity_has_any    = eventseverity_has_any,
    disabled                 = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
